use_cases: Displaying available AI models with pricing, context windows, and capabilities in a searchable catalog
Comparing AI model providers and their features side-by-side in a grid layout
Allowing users to select and explore detailed information about specific AI models
Showcasing AI model capabilities like vision, function calling, and audio support
Presenting AI service pricing information in a clean, scannable format
ai_summary: A responsive card grid component for displaying AI models with provider information, pricing tiers, context window limits, and capability badges. Features hover scale animations and click-to-expand functionality for detailed model inspection. Built with Framer Motion for smooth interactions and uses standard Tailwind styling for a clean, minimalist appearance suitable for SaaS AI marketplaces or developer documentation.
